full_text:
Dang Jun 黨均
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dang Jun (黨均). Served as advisor to Deng Ai. Spread false rumours about Jiang Wei. Dang Jun is a fictional character. Dang Jun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
